title: Business Breakfast | Stock/Share Market News | 9th March 2026 || TV5 Money Live

recommendations.note: Top pick among hospital stocks for growing pan-India presence
recommendations.detail: Between KIMS, Rainbow and HCG his choice is KIMS, because it is expanding its pan-India presence. He flagged a potential merger of KIMS with a chain of hospitals (Quality Care, AsterDM Healthcare and an overseas company), which would increase size substantially. There is uncertainty over the merger swap ratio, but otherwise he said KIMS is definitely the better choice.

recommendations.note: Hold; ran to 52-week high then corrected with the market
recommendations.detail: JSW Infra recently went up to a 52-week high and corrected along with market conditions. For a long-term investor, since the company is reaching a more mature stage and is doing well, he advised holding now rather than selling.

recommendations.note: No need to sell at this rate, but stay alert
recommendations.detail: He called it one of the better small finance banks operationally, with decent performance. But it is small (market cap ~2,300 crore), penny-ish, and showed losses in the last two quarters with a turnaround in doubt. He said there is no need to sell at this rate, but to be a bit alert.

recommendations.note: Start accumulating below 140; defence order book improving
recommendations.detail: Despite two or three disappointing quarters and negative market sentiment, its defence exposure limits downside at this price. He noted a recent major order announcement (about Rs 122 crore) and said the future is rosy. He advised starting an accumulation attempt, ideally below 140, and said definitely buy.
